ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division in which the team participates */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle for the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the division */,
  "promotion_threshold" INTEGER /* Number of points required for promotion to the next division */,
  "relegation_threshold" INTEGER /* Number of points that result in relegation to a lower division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date on which the match was played */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indication if the team played at home or away */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (win, lose, draw) */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the opponent */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season */,
  "runner_up_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that was the runner-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_runner_up_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the stats were recorded */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was offside */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the team in the season */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Total number of matches won by the team */,
  "matches_lost" INTEGER /* Total number of matches lost by the team */,
  "matches_drawn" INTEGER /* Total number of matches drawn by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the season */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_stats" (
  "goal_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the stats were recorded */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored against the team */,
  "first_half_goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team in the first half */,
  "second_half_goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team in the second half */,
  "first_half_goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored against the team in the first half */,
  "second_half_goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored against the team in the second half */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan engagement event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the team */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, like, comment) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from where the engagement occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, coach, player) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
